description:
The library `github.com/emicklei/go-restful/v3` version `3.7.3` was detected in `Golang binary` located at `/usr/bin/containerd` and is vulnerable to `CVE-2022-1996`, which exists in versions `>=3.0.0, <3.8.0`.

The vulnerability was found in the [The Go Vulnerability Database](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-1996) with vendor severity: `Critical` ([NVD](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-1996) severity: `Critical`).

This vulnerability has a known exploit available. Source: [VulnCheck](https://huntr.dev/bounties/be837427-415c-4d8c-808b-62ce20aa84f1).

This vulnerability cannot be remediated directly because `github.com/emicklei/go-restful/v3` is installed as part of `containerd.io`. Please consider updating `containerd.io`.

The library `github.com/emicklei/go-restful` version `2.9.5+incompatible` was detected in `Golang binary` located at `/usr/bin/containerd` and is vulnerable to `CVE-2022-1996`, which exists in versions `<2.16.0`.

The vulnerability was found in the [The Go Vulnerability Database](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-1996) with vendor severity: `Critical` ([NVD](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-1996) severity: `Critical`).

This vulnerability has a known exploit available. Source: [VulnCheck](https://huntr.dev/bounties/be837427-415c-4d8c-808b-62ce20aa84f1).

This vulnerability cannot be remediated directly because `github.com/emicklei/go-restful` is installed as part of `containerd.io`. Please consider updating `containerd.io`.
